summary: Frontend launch-polish regression mostly passed on mobile web preview: Home/Premium branding updates, premium CTA wording, premium state badge visibility, legal/support navigation, and route loading all worked. One copy consistency issue remains in Settings.

ui_bugs.issue: Settings still shows legacy heading text 'About FreqFlow' instead of the updated app name Flow Freak AI.

issues: Footer tagline remains 'Your Pocket Wellness Companion' and does not match approved store tagline 'Your AI frequency wellness companion'.

react_native_issues.issue: Non-blocking warnings observed: deprecated pointerEvents prop and useNativeDriver fallback warning on web.

action_items: Update Settings copy to remove stale 'FreqFlow' naming and align all visible app-name references to 'Flow Freak AI'.
Align in-app tagline copy with approved store tagline where intended (especially Settings footer).
Optional cleanup: reduce recurring Expo web warnings (pointerEvents deprecation/useNativeDriver web warning) if they appear in production logs.
critical_code_review_comments: Brand constants are correctly used across Home, Premium footer, support cards, and legal screens; route wiring is stable.
Settings contains hardcoded legacy brand text ('About FreqFlow') and a non-approved tagline string, creating launch-copy inconsistency.
Frontend uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL in code; environment policy docs mention EXPO_BACKEND_URL. Keep one convention to avoid future config drift.

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all 5 requested flows passed; 1 copy consistency issue found)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated on public preview https://freq-flow-test.preview.emergentagent.com using mobile viewport 375x667. Home branding and support card matched Flow Freak AI + OrganicStylz. Premium showed softer copy, Restore Purchases, Buy Now wording, and Trial Open badge. Settings legal chips opened Privacy/Terms/Contact successfully.
rca_of_issue: Reproduction: Open Settings tab and scroll to About section. Heading text displays 'About FreqFlow' (legacy hardcoded string in /app/frontend/src/screens/SettingsScreen.tsx), while other screens use brand constants and new naming. Mitigation: replace hardcoded legacy strings with APP_NAME/tagline constants.
test_credentials: Not applicable for this frontend-only, non-auth scope.
